title: Executive Order 5393—Power-Site Restoration No. 444
text:
Transmission Line, Idaho
So much of the order of October 29, 1913, creating Power-Site Reserve No. 406, as affects the lands hereinafter described, is hereby revoked:
BOISE MERIDIAN
T. 6 S., R. 11 E., sec. 3, NW. ¼ of SW. ¼;
sec. 4, lot 1, SE. ¼ of NE. ¼, E. ½ Of SE. ¼.
HERBERT HOOVER
The White House,
July 10, 1930.
